videos.headline: A nice grab gives Arkansas State great field position
videos.description: QB Justice Hansen lobs it up for WR Omar Bayless who climbs the ladder and pulls down a great catch.

videos.headline: Bayless' grab  gives Arkansas State the lead with passing TD
videos.description: QB Justice Hansen connects with WR Omar Bayless for the 32-yard TD pass to take the lead.

videos.headline: SMU regains lead with long TD
videos.description: QB Ben Hicks sends it to WR James Proche who reaches over the pylon for a 55-yard score. The play was reviewed and called a touchdown.

videos.headline: Arkansas State adds another passing TD to take the lead
videos.description: QB Justice Hansen looks to the corner of the endzone and finds WR Blake Mack for the touchdown to take a 4 point lead.

videos.headline: Direct snap to Sutton leads to easy TD for SMU
videos.description: The Mustangs line up in wildcat formation and Courtland Sutton runs it in after he takes the direct snap.

videos.headline: Mack comes up just short of TD for Ark St and fumbles
videos.description: A mere yard short of a touchdown, WR Blake Mack loses his balance and fumbles, resulting in a costly turnover.

videos.headline: Arkansas State RB runs up the middle for TD
videos.description: RB Warren Wand pushes in from 5 yards to bring the Red Wolves to within 16.

videos.headline: Jones gains 40 and loses a shoe
videos.description: RB Xavier Jones runs right out of his shoes as he gains 40 yards.
